metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage Wiki: Codes, Tier List, and Stand Guides
metadata.description: Master Bizarre Lineage with our complete wiki. Get the latest active codes, updated tier lists, stand evolution guides, and pro strategies to dominate Roblox.

hero.title: Bizarre Lineage Wiki: The Ultimate Resource for Stands, Builds & Meta
hero.dek: Master every mechanic in Bizarre Lineage with our comprehensive wiki. Explore the Bizarre Lineage tier list, discover the best builds, and follow our detailed Bizarre Lineage leveling guide to dominate Morioh Cho. Stay updated with the latest Bizarre Lineage meta and game mechanics.
hero.tip: The most trusted Bizarre Lineage Wiki for the Roblox community.

world.title: Explore Morioh Cho in Bizarre Lineage
world.description: Bizarre Lineage is more than just a roll-and-fight game; it's a full-scale recreation of Morioh Cho. From the bustling Train Station where Raids occur to the hidden alleys where NPCs teach secret Fighting Styles, every corner holds a secret. Whether you're a Part 3 classicist or a Part 8 fan, our wiki provides the maps, spawn locations, and combat guides to help you dominate both PvE events and the competitive PvP ladder.

progression.title: The Bizarre Lineage Progression Route
progression.description: A structured path through the Bizarre Lineage Wiki, from your first Stand to the final prestige.

steps.title: Starter: The First Arrow
steps.description: Level 1-10. Claim your first Bizarre Lineage Stand using arrows. Focus on completing basic quests in Morioh to stabilize your early-game resource flow.
steps.meta: Goal: Secure a Tier A/S Stand

steps.title: Build: Style & Specialization
steps.description: Level 10-30. Optimize your Bizarre Lineage build by learning Hamon, Vampire, or Boxing. Invest stat points to unlock your Stand’s unique sub-abilities.

steps.title: Evolution: The Mid-Game Grind
steps.description: Level 30-50. This is the peak Bizarre Lineage leveling phase. Farm World Bosses and Raids to collect evolution items like the Diary or Green Baby.

steps.title: Ascension: Stand Awakening
steps.description: Level 50. Reach the first major power spike in Bizarre Lineage. Complete the specialized awakening quest to unlock massive damage buffs.

steps.title: Endgame: The Prestige Cycle
steps.description: Max Level. Reset your Bizarre Lineage character to gain Prestige. This unlocks the Prestige Shop, exclusive skins, and higher level caps.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: These are the questions new and returning players usually need answered before choosing their next page, especially after searching Bizarre Lineage wiki, Bizarre Lineage best stand, or Bizarre Lineage Roblox help terms.

items.question: What is the best stand for beginners?
items.answer: The best beginner stand is usually the one that is stable, easy to use, and does not force a costly reroll chase too early.

items.question: When should you prestige?
items.answer: Prestige when your route is slowing down, important value is already secured, and you know what the reset is helping you unlock.

items.question: Should beginners chase an S-tier stand immediately?
items.answer: Usually no. A strong route starts with a stand you can actually use well, then upgrades into premium targets once your resources and progression are more stable.

items.question: Why do stats matter so early in Bizarre Lineage?
items.answer: Because bad early stat spending can slow both PvE progress and later build options. Even a strong stand feels worse if the build around it is inefficient.

items.question: Do codes matter after the first session?
items.answer: Yes. Codes are useful whenever they give spins, arrows, or progression value that saves time on your current route.

items.question: Is prestige always worth taking as soon as it unlocks?
items.answer: No. Prestige is strongest when you understand what you gain, what you might lose, and what your next route looks like after resetting.

items.question: What should I read after checking the homepage?
items.answer: Most players move next to the codes page, the tier list, the beginner guide, or a stand page depending on whether they need rewards, rankings, route help, or a specific stand answer.
